finding_results.notes: Vel's disclosure now carries concrete shared-history detail, a bodily aftershock in the retelling, and a specific dawn-after consequence so the memory wounds her as a person rather than functioning as neutral threshold lore.
The repeated firelight hand-scar inventory is removed. The firelit observation now pivots to Vel's pain management and how she stays useful while hurt.
The chapter keeps one distinct sleeping-Dren image. The later callback now shifts to his sleeping face instead of re-describing the protected wounded arm.

Chapter now runs 4086 words while preserving the heading contract. Added material is causal: post-stitch triage, load management, non-ability competence beats, explicit resource pressure around Vel's ribs, and a deeper threshold disclosure.

summary: Expanded Chapter 9 to 4086 words, strengthened the care-and-depletion engine, made Vel's threshold story personally costly on the page, and removed the repeated firelight-scar and sleeping-arm images.
